meaning: n.宾夕法尼亚州(美国州名)
examples: The area code for western Pennsylvania is 412.
Southern Pennsylvania is still a world unto itself.
Pennsylvania brought back the death penalty in 1978.

He halved the Pennsylvania fund's holdings in Oakley in 2000, when the stock price rose.
